thought.text: Let me fix all the syntax errors:

reasoning_content: There are several syntax errors in my implementation. Let me fix them.

action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
content = open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp', 'r').read()
# Fix 1: IntegerLiteral
content = content.replace('return llvm::ConstantInt::get(self(obj->val);', '')
content = content.replace(\"return llvm::ConstantInt::get(self(obj->type), obj->), obj->val);\", 'return llvm::ConstantInt::get(self(obj->type), obj->val);')
# Fix 2: subt.qual double assignment
content = content.replace('subt.qual = type->qual = type->qual;', 'subt.qual = type->qual;')
# Fix 3: BinaryExpr:kMod typo
content = content.replace('case BinaryExpr::kMod:kMod:', 'case BinaryExpr::kMod:')
# Fix 4: IfStmt missing paren
content = content.replace('if (obj->else_ {', 'if (obj->else_) {')
# Fix 5: getPointerElementType deprecated - use getElementType for opaque ptr
content = content.replace('ptr->getType()->getPointerElementType()', 'ptr->getType()')
open('task/3/EmitIR.cpp', 'w').write(content)
print('Fixed')
"

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments:
{"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "

# Fix 2: subt.qual double assignment
